title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim's Paraform rejected the AI-driven recruitment automation model common in the industry and instead built a business paying human recruiters to handle hiring for enterprise customers. The company 10x'd revenue in 2025 by positioning human recruiters as the competitive moat while other platforms raced toward full automation.
